title: Learning to Drive
content: Sofia was nervous during her first driving lesson. Her instructor was patient and explained everything slowly. At first, Sofia held the steering wheel too tightly and worried about every small mistake. They practiced parking, stopping at traffic lights, and turning at corners. After some time, she started feeling more comfortable behind the wheel. The instructor smiled and told her she was improving quickly. When the lesson ended, Sofia felt proud of herself. She knew learning to drive would take time, but she was excited to continue practicing.
